Package jsim.api

Class SimRobot

java.lang.Object
jsim.api.SimRobot
public class SimRobot extends Object
External interface for simulated FRC Robots interacting with JSim.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    SimRobot.RobotState
    Internal state for a simulated robot, including pose and speeds.

  • Constructor Details

    • SimRobot

      protected SimRobot(RobotID id, FieldState<SimRobot.RobotState> stateRef)
      Protected constructor. Use SimRobot.createRobot().
      Parameters:
      id - The RobotID for this robot.
      stateRef - The field state reference for this robot.

  • Method Details

    • createRobot

      public static SimRobot createRobot(RobotID id, edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Translation2d[] frameDimensions)
      Initializes a new robot via the unified StateManager tracking system.
      Parameters:
      id - The logical driver station id.
      frameDimensions - Translation2d[] for each vertex of the frame perimeter
      Returns:
      the instantiated SimRobot handle.

    • getPose

      public edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Pose2d getPose()
      Retrieves the current field-relative odometry pose. Pulled strictly from the StateManager snapshot.
      Returns:
      the current pose of the robot.

    • resetPose

      public void resetPose(edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Pose2d pose)
      Hard overrides the state manager's simulation pose for this robot.
      Parameters:
      pose - the new pose to set for the robot.

    • setChassisSpeeds

      public void setChassisSpeeds(edu.wpi.first.math.kinematics.ChassisSpeeds speeds)
      Applies commanded speeds to the physics solver.
      Parameters:
      speeds - the chassis speeds to apply.

    • getRobotID

      public RobotID getRobotID()
      Gets the RobotID for this robot.
      Returns:
      the RobotID assigned to this robot.
